children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses her involvement in various aspects of the Chicano Movement, including: interning for Senator Joe Bernal, school walkouts, the Mexican American Affairs Committee, La Raza Unida Party, and more.

citation: "The Late 1960s," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta, June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4215/the-late-1960s, accessed May 08, 2026.
label: 7. The Late 1960s
